    Action Items:

    - David to coordinate with the development team to start the initial phase.

    - Schedule the next meeting for June 1, 2024.

    '

args.subject: Summary of the client meeting
args.body:
Dear John Mitchell,

Here is a brief summary of our recent client meeting held on May 5, 2024:

- We discussed your requirements for the new project.
- An agreement was reached on the project timeline and key milestones.
- We reviewed the initial design concepts and gathered your feedback.

Action Items:
- I will update the project plan based on your feedback.
- David will coordinate with the development team to begin the initial phase.

Please note that our next meeting is scheduled for June 1, 2024.

Best regards,
Emma Johnson
